text: Last class you compared two flights and booked the trip.
Today you check in, go through security, and find your gate.
Go to gate twelve in terminal two.
Please proceed through the security check.
Good morning. Welcome to the check-in desk. May I see your passport, please?
Here you are. I have one bag to check. Is the flight on time, or is it delayed?
It is delayed by forty minutes. Put your luggage on the belt, please. Here is your boarding pass.
Thank you. Which gate is it, and which terminal?
Go to gate twelve in terminal two. Don't forget your passport at passport control.
Got it. I will go through the security check and board at gate twelve. Thank you very much.
I have one bag to check.
Which gate is it, and which terminal?

Good morning, passengers. This is an announcement for the flight to Basel. Please note that the flight is now delayed by forty minutes. The new boarding time is ten forty. Go to gate twelve in terminal two. Before you board, have your boarding pass and your passport ready. Please proceed through the security check and passport control now, because the lines are long this morning. Do not leave your luggage unattended at any time. We will start boarding at the gate soon. Thank you for your patience, and have a good flight.

This is a quick voice note about my morning at the airport. First I went to the check-in desk and dropped off my luggage. The agent told me my flight is delayed by forty minutes, so I have more time. Then I went through the security check, and after that, passport control. Now I am at terminal two, near gate twelve. The board says boarding starts at ten forty. I still need to buy water and find the gate. I will not forget my boarding pass this time, and I will board as soon as they call my row. Everything is going well so far.

First, Aline goes to the check-in desk and drops off her luggage. Then she hears an announcement that the flight is delayed. After that, she goes through the security check. Next, she passes passport control and walks to terminal two. Finally, she finds gate twelve and waits to board the plane.
Go to gate twelve in terminal two.
Put your luggage on the belt, please.
The flight is delayed by forty minutes.
Please proceed through the security check.
Don't forget your passport at passport control.
Which gate is it, and which terminal?
I have one bag to check.
